COMMON.LOGOUT_CONFIRM: Do you really want to log out?

AI.PRIORITY_CHANGED: Priority changed — click again to refresh the advice.

ASSISTANT.TITLE: GoRide Assistant
ASSISTANT.WELCOME: Hello! I'm the GoRide assistant powered by Google Gemini — I know live fleet and trips. Ask something specific (e.g. 5-seat car Tunis → Sfax, or how to rent as a company).
ASSISTANT.PLACEHOLDER: e.g. Which car for a long trip?

ERROR.BACKEND_UNREACHABLE: Cannot reach backend. 1) Start GoRide on port 8081. 2) Refresh this page (F5).
ERROR.ACCESS_DENIED: Access denied. Restart the backend and refresh (F5).
ERROR.CONNECTION_FAILED: Cannot connect to http://localhost:8081 — start the backend, then press F5.
ERROR.SERVER_ERROR: Assistant server error. Check backend logs.
